articles.title: Voi founders' new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
articles.description: AI startup Pit is led by the cofounders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.
articles.content:
Swedish startup Pit may have gained notice for some rage-bait social media posts, but it has also become another Stockholm AI startup to watch.

articles.title: The Problem Airlines Ran Into By Quietly Scanning Every Bag With AI In 2026
articles.description: AI is creeping in to every part of the flight experience, but especially so in baggage handling. An era of hyper-strict baggage enforcement is coming.
articles.content: A silent technological revolution is upon us, where cameras can now identify your suitcase by its individual dents, scratches, and unique blemishes. This level of precision was initially designed to rescue the industry from a staggering 74.7% surge i... [9336 chars]

articles.title: The rapid embrace of AI in China, its biggest testing ground, may shape how AI is used globally
articles.description: On a recent weekday, around 50 people gathered outside the headquarters of a Chinese mobile internet company, waiting to get help with installing an artificial intelligence assistant. articles.title: Indosat CEO is building an AI for Indonesian languages. Can he make a business case for it?
articles.description: Vikram Sinha wants Sahabat AI to be a platform for Indonesia's startups—even if he admits his team can't quite think of a "business case" right now.

articles.title: Can AI achieve enlightenment? Robot becomes Buddhist monk
articles.description: Is this innovation in religion or crossing a line? Gabi robot monk. Buddhist monk robot. AI in religion. Unitree G1 robot. South Korea humanoid robot Buddhist monk.
articles.content:

articles.title: French prosecutors' probe of Elon Musk, X now a criminal investigation
articles.description: France is investigating whether Elon Musk and his social media app X were complicit in spreading harmful AI deepfakes.
articles.content:
French cybercrime authorities have escalated an investigation of Elon Musk and his social network X to a criminal probe, the Paris prosecutor's office said Thursday.

articles.title: Chrome Deletes Its Own Privacy Promise for Sneaky On
articles.description: Chrome is quietly installing a 4GB AI on your devices. And now, its latest version has removed the disclosure that promised to keep your data off Google’s servers.
articles.content:
Google Chrome's settings page made a quiet promise before its most recent update.
